lore.english:
Taimanin. As a veteran, her skills have been verified. A bloodthirsty Taimanin who thinks of nothing but fighting. She is slightly more of a trigger-happy maniac than a Taimanin.

Often off on missions for long periods of time, whenever she returns to Gosha, she picks fights against random people, be it teacher or student in the name of "hard-core training". Although dreaded for her "brawling habit", she only picks fights against people she thinks are strong enough; those who know this are smart enough not to get in her way.

Her combat style involves a long spear and fire art. She can ignite the spearhead, fire it like a rocket, and incinerate anyone that makes contact.

skills.name: [&Color_Orange][&CRI_RATE] Aura[-]
skills.description: Increase CRIT Rate of All allies by 17.5% in Main Story
skills.description_readable: Increase CRIT Rate of All allies by 17.5% in Main Story

skills.name: [&Color_Cyan]Flaming Spear[-]
skills.description:
Charges with the spear, attacking the enemy 2 times.
If the target is inflicted with [&Burn], [&Common_Word_Skill_Damage] increases by [&Color_Cyan]([V3:350102]%)[-].
skills.description_readable:
Charges with the spear, attacking the enemy 2 times.
If the target is inflicted with Burn, DMG increases by (7.5%).

skills.name: [&Color_Cyan]Flaming Spear Storm[-]
skills.description:
Swings the spear wildly, attacking the enemy 6 times.
On the [&Common_Word_Skill_ActionLast], amplifies DMG of [&Burn] by [&Color_Cyan][V3:350202]%[-] at a [&Color_Cyan][R:350202]%[-] chance.
If the target is a [&Technique] type, the DMG of [&Burn] is additionally amplified by [&Color_Cyan][V3:350203]%[-].
skills.description_readable:
Swings the spear wildly, attacking the enemy 6 times.
On the Last Attack, amplifies DMG of Burn by 3% at a 50% chance.
If the target is a Technique type, the DMG of Burn is additionally amplified by 1%.

skills.name: [&Color_Cyan]Explosive Spear Charge[-]
skills.description:
Rides the spear high into the sky and dives down with the spear towards the enemy.
If the target has 2 or more [&DeBuff]s, [&CRI_RATE] increases by [&Color_Cyan]([V3:350302]%)[-].
If the target has 4 or more [&DeBuff]s, [&CRI_RATE] increases by [&Color_Cyan]([V3:350303]%)[-].
skills.description_readable:
Rides the spear high into the sky and dives down with the spear towards the enemy.
If the target has 2 or more Debuffs, CRIT Rate increases by (37.5%).
If the target has 4 or more Debuffs, CRIT Rate increases by (65%).

skills.name: [&Color_Cyan]Flaming Spear Battler[-]
skills.description:
When attacking an enemy with [&Color_Cyan]70%[-] or more [&HP], reduces 1 [&Common_Word_Skill_Random] [&Buff] turn the target has by [V3:350401] turn(s)
When attacking an enemy with less than [&Color_Cyan]40%[-] [&HP], performs a [&Common_Word_Skill_ShieldPenetrate] attack.
skills.description_readable:
When attacking an enemy with 70% or more HP, reduces 1 Random Buff turn the target has by 1 turn(s)
When attacking an enemy with less than 40% HP, performs a Shield Penetrate attack.

skill_data.name: <[&Tbl_UnitWeapon_Name_3501]> [&Tbl_UnitSkill_Name_3501]
skill_data.description:
Charges while mounted on a spear and attacks 2 times.
If the target is inflicted with [&Burn], [&Common_Word_Skill_CriticalRate] increases [&Color_Cyan][V3:351102]%[-].
skill_data.description_readable:
Charges while mounted on a spear and attacks 2 times.
If the target is inflicted with Burn, CRIT Rate increases 7.5%.

skill_data.name: <[&Tbl_UnitWeapon_Name_3502]> [&Tbl_UnitSkill_Name_3504]
skill_data.description:
When attacking an enemy with [&HP] at [&Color_Cyan]70%[-] or more, reduces [V3:350401] turn(s) of 1 [&Common_Word_Skill_Random] [&Buff] they possess.
When attacking an enemy with [&HP] less than [&Color_Cyan]40%[-], performs a [&Color_Cyan]([V3:351402]%)[-] [&Common_Word_Skill_DefPenetrate] attack.
skill_data.description_readable:
When attacking an enemy with HP at 70% or more, reduces 1 turn(s) of 1 Random Buff they possess.
When attacking an enemy with HP less than 40%, performs a (15%) DEF Penetrate attack.
